prompt:
Scene:
A square virtual fitting sheet in a clean fashion studio, arranged as four equal full-body panels with consistent camera height, neutral background, and catalog lighting.

Subject:
One fictional adult model appears in all four panels with the same face, hair, skin tone, body proportions, posture language, and expression. Only the outfit changes: baseline black outfit, office tailoring, rain streetwear, and evening gallery look. The four panels should make identity preservation easy to compare.

Important details:
Photorealistic fashion catalog style, precise panel alignment, consistent anatomy, realistic garment fit, no identity drift between panels, no label text. The model should be fictional and should not resemble a real person.

Use case:
Independent virtual try-on study for testing identity preservation across multiple outfit changes in one image.

Constraints:
Exactly four panels, same fictional model identity in all panels, change only clothing and accessories, no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands or feet, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Four-Look Fitting Sheet
description: One fictional model appears in four outfits for identity-lock comparison.

generation.runner_notes: Independent prompted image; no reference URL required.

en.title: Four-Look Fitting Sheet
en.description: One fictional model appears in four outfits for identity-lock comparison.
